s-1.ptxt: DISCONNECT CABLE FROM NEGATIVE BATTERY TERMINAL
REMOVE FRONT DOOR SCUFF PLATE LH

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 5 claws and 2 clips, and remove the rear door scuff plate LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COWL SIDE TRIM SUB-ASSEMBLY LH

s2.ptxt: Remove the cowl side trim clip.
Disengage the 2 clips and remove the cowl side trim sub-assembly LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt <A> and the screw <B>.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL LH (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt:
Remove the bolt and the screw or

.
Disconnect the hood lock control cable assembly.
Disengage the claw and the 9 clips.
Remove the air hose, disconnect the connector, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel LH.
Disengage the 3 claws and the 2 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the instrument panel sub-assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/o Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips, and then remove the lower instrument panel finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE LOWER INSTRUMENT PANEL FINISH PANEL (w/ Smart Key System)

s2.ptxt: Disengage the 2 claws and 2 clips.
Disconnect the connector and remove the lower instrument panel finish panel.
Remove the 2 clips.
Disengage the guide and 4 claws, and then remove the instrument cluster finish panel.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMC Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws <E>.
Disconnect each connector and remove the combination meter assembly.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE COMBINATION METER ASSEMBLY (for TMMK Made)

s2.ptxt: Remove the 4 screws <R>.
Disconnect each connector and remove the combination meter assembly.
Disconnect the clutch start switch connector.
Disconnect the clutch switch connector (with cruise control).

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER PUSH ROD CLEVIS PIN

s2.ptxt: Remove the clip and pin.
Remove the bolt, 2 nuts and clutch pedal support assembly.
While the clutch pedal is fully depressed, remove the torsion spring.
Remove the pedal with hook spring.
Remove the pedal shaft and nut.
Remove the clutch pedal from the clutch pedal support.
Remove the clutch pedal spring holder from the clutch pedal support.
Remove the clutch pedal pad from the clutch pedal.
Remove the 2 pedal bushings and pedal shaft collar from the clutch pedal.
Using needle-nose pliers, remove the 2 No. 1 clutch pedal cushions from the clutch pedal.
Remove the turnover bushing from the clutch pedal.

s-1.ptxt: REMOVE CLUTCH MASTER CYLINDER PUSH ROD CLEVIS BUSHING

s2.ptxt: Using an 8 mm hexagon wrench and a hammer, remove the clevis bushing from the clutch pedal.
